title: Center hero text elements and replace duplicate brand text with logo

requirements.summary: Center the three styled brand name elements ('Legend', 'X', 'Arena') in the hero section horizontally on the page
acceptanceCriteria: The three h1 brand name elements in the hero section are centered horizontally.
Centering applies consistently on all screen sizes.

file_operations.description: Locate the container div holding the three h1 elements ('Legend', 'X', 'Arena') in the hero section and update its styling to center its children horizontally. Add flex centering classes (such as 'flex justify-center' or 'text-center') to the parent container so the brand name elements are centered instead of left-aligned. Ensure the centering is responsive across all screen sizes.

requirements.summary: Remove duplicate 'Legend X Arena' text labels in the top-left area of the hero section and replace with the original logo image
acceptanceCriteria: The duplicate 'Legend', 'X', 'Arena' text shown in the top-left area of the hero section is removed.
The original logo image (as used in the Navbar) is displayed in its place.
No duplicate brand text labels appear anywhere in the hero section's top-left area.

file_operations.description: Identify and remove the duplicate 'Legend X Arena' text labels (the second occurrence of brand name elements) appearing in the top-left area of the hero section. Replace them with an img element that references the same logo asset used in Navbar.tsx. Use the workspace file path 'frontend/public/assets/generated/legend-x-logo.dim_512x512.png' for the logo src. Apply appropriate sizing and positioning to match the visual hierarchy of the hero section's top-left area.
